# Pagination
Numbered page controls with previous/next navigation.
## Import
```tsx
import { Pagination } from "@/components/ui/pagination";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Pagination page={1} totalPages={5} animate={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **page** (number) — default: `1`: Page
- **totalPages** (number) — default: `5`: Total pages
- **label** (string): Text
- **animate** (boolean): Animate
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add pagination
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/pagination
```
